canvas.help.description: LED canvas lets multiple devices register their LEDs as one virtual device so lighting effects can stay more consistent. Double-click a device to edit LEDs, keep dragging the canvas while editing, hold Ctrl to multi-select LEDs, and use Ctrl+Z to undo edit steps.
device.staleTooltip: Saved layout changed. Remove and add it again.
layoutManager.noEffectSelected: Choose an effect to edit its settings.
layoutManager.noSettings: This effect has no configurable settings.
layoutManager.unsupported: This parameter type is not supported yet.
device.ledCountMismatch: Saved layout no longer matches the device LED count
device.layoutMismatch: Saved layout was edited and no longer matches the device
device.confirmRemoveCustom: This placement has a custom LED layout. Removing it will discard the layout. Continue?
editMode.hint: Drag LEDs to rearrange. Grid expands automatically.
studioImport.title: Import from Studio
studioImport.selectTab: Select a Studio layout to import
studioImport.ledMismatch.title: LED count mismatch
studioImport.ledMismatch.guide: Please adjust LED counts in the main interface first, then come back to import.
studioImport.ledMismatch.step1: Open the main interface and find the device
studioImport.ledMismatch.step2: Click the "Edit LED" button on the device
studioImport.ledMismatch.step3: In Simple Mode, adjust the output LED count to match the Studio value
studioImport.ledMismatch.step4: Save, then come back here and click "Refresh device status" below
studioImport.ledMismatch.forceImport: Import anyway (LED positions may be incomplete)
